title: Yale - Y110B/30/115/2 Standard Security 30mm Brass Padlock, Pack of 2 - Open Hardened Steel Shackle - 3 keyed Alike Keys
features: DESIGNED FOR INDOOR USAGE: Helps you secure your locker, rucksack or other belongings you need to secure indoors
ENCHANCED SECURITY: 4-pin cylinder brass padlock with double locking for added security and hardened steel shackle to prevent cutting

RIGOROUSLY TESTED: Tested to EN12320:2012 to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, twisting and pulling of shackle; also tested up to 96 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions with a CEN rating of 1
INDIVIDUAL DIMENSIONS: Body Width: 30 mm, Body Height: 28.3 mm, Body Depth: 13 mm, Shackle Diameter: 5, Weight: 90 g
AN EXCLUSIVE YALE DESIGN: With a range of different sizes from 15 mm to 70 mm to suit your security needs
description: From the manufacturer Yale, inspired by the past, is creating the future of security. With 180 years of manufacturing expertise, we are introducing our padlocks with an exclusive Yale design and tested to EN12320:2012 standard for added security and reassurance, built with you in mind. Designed for indoor usage Suitable for your gym locker, rucksack, tool box or other belongings you want to keep safe and secure indoors. Yale takes care of your possessions; you take care of the rest. Setting up quality standards Tested to EN12320:2012 to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, twisting and pulling of shackle. Plus tested up to 96 hours for corrosion resistance to withstand different weather conditions for total peace of mind. Enhanced security Even those DIY tools in your shed can be kept safe and secure, with a hardened steel shackle and double locking for added security, built with you in mind.
